---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(tidyverse) 
library(janitor) 

senate_candidates <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/CNS_r_scripts/2026_GP_statesenatorbydistrict_candidatelist.csv") |> clean_names()

senate_candidates_count <- senate_candidates |> 
  mutate(senate_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(senate_district) |> count(senate_district) |> rename(num_candidates = n)

write.csv(senate_candidates_count, file ="senate_candidates_count.csv") 

```



```{r}


```
